texts.ming: The Life Palace (命宮) is the heart of the chart, describing your essential character, temperament and the overall arc of your destiny.
texts.siblings: The Siblings Palace (兄弟宮) speaks of brothers, sisters and close peers, and of how you cooperate and share with those who stand beside you.
texts.spouse: The Spouse Palace (夫妻宮) governs marriage and partnership, revealing the nature of your closest bonds and the rhythm of your romantic life.
texts.children: The Children Palace (子女宮) concerns offspring, pupils and creative offspring alike, and the care, vitality and legacy you pass on.
texts.wealth: The Wealth Palace (財帛宮) describes income, money and material fortune — how resources flow to you and how you hold them.
texts.health: The Health Palace (疾厄宮) reflects constitution, vitality and vulnerability to illness, and the bodily and emotional strains to mind.
texts.travel: The Travel Palace (遷移宮) governs movement, journeys and opportunities away from home, and how the wider world receives you.
texts.friends: The Friends Palace (僕役宮) covers companions, colleagues and subordinates, and the support or friction you meet within your circle.
texts.career: The Career Palace (官祿宮) describes vocation, status and achievement, and the standing you build through your work.
texts.property: The Property Palace (田宅宮) concerns home, land and family assets, and the security and atmosphere of where you dwell.
texts.fortune: The Fortune Palace (福德宮) speaks of contentment, spiritual life and blessings, and the inner peace that underlies outward fortune.
texts.parents: The Parents Palace (父母宮) governs parents, elders and authority, and the protection, guidance and inheritance you receive from them.
